sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19228" key="bala/nissa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰλᾰ´ν-ισσα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βαλανεύς,</foreign> <sense id="n19228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bathing-woman,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
